seoTitle: How to Create an Affiliate Program with GoHighLevel
metaDescription: Learn how to build and manage an affiliate program in GoHighLevel, from setup to tracking payouts.
intro: An affiliate program can expand your reach without upfront ad spend, but only if it's set up and managed well. This tutorial walks through creating an affiliate program in GoHighLevel, including tracking affiliates and managing payouts.

steps.heading: Set up your affiliate program
steps.body: Create the affiliate program structure within GoHighLevel, defining commission terms and program details.

steps.heading: Manage your affiliates
steps.body: Add and organize affiliates within GoHighLevel so you can track their activity and performance.

steps.heading: Automate affiliate processes
steps.body: Use GoHighLevel's automation tools to streamline communication and payout tracking with minimal manual effort.

steps.heading: Apply best practices for growth
steps.body: Focus on clear communication and fair commission structures to keep affiliates motivated and driving sales.

faq.question: Can I set different commission rates for different affiliates?
faq.answer: Yes, GoHighLevel typically allows you to customize commission structures for individual affiliates or groups.

faq.question: How do affiliates track their own referrals and earnings?
faq.answer: Affiliates generally get access to a dashboard where they can view their referral activity and earnings.

faq.question: Does GoHighLevel handle affiliate payouts automatically?
faq.answer: It can help track what's owed, though the actual payout process may still require you to issue payments through a connected method.

faq.question: Is an affiliate program suitable for a small business just starting out?
faq.answer: Yes, affiliate programs can work at any scale, though it's worth having a clear value proposition before recruiting affiliates.
